mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recipe ORDER BY created_date DESC
SELECT DISTINCT r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN ingredient i ON r.recipe_id = i.recipe_id JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE i.ingredient_name LIKE #{pattern}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe r JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.category_id JOIN food f ON r.food_id = f.food_id
AND (c.category_name = #{category} OR c.sub_category_name = #{category})
AND f.food_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) <= 10
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) > 10 AND CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) <= 20
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) > 20 AND CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) <= 30
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) > 30 AND CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) <= 60
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) >= 60
)

SELECT r.recipe_id, f.food_name AS title, r.thumbnail, r.cooking_time, r.difficulty, r.view_count, r.like_count, r.status, r.created_date, r.updated_date, r.nutrition_id, r.member_id, r.category_id, r.food_id FROM recipe r JOIN food f ON r.food_id = f.food_id JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.category_id
AND (c.category_name = #{category} OR c.sub_category_name = #{category})
AND f.food_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) <= 10
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) > 10 AND CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) <= 20
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) > 20 AND CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) <= 30
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) > 30 AND CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) <= 60
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) >= 60
)
ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, f.food_name ASC,
r.view_count DESC
r.like_count DESC
r.created_date DESC
CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) ASC
, r.recipe_id DESC
LIMIT 9 OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT count(*) FROM recipe WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
